rubric_text: In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-2 must have a comment containing 'T&E review complete—all lines supported' and 'OPS_HR_TE-2'.
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-3 must have a comment containing 'Missing business justification. Please submit personal reimbursement for line item: 1.'.
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-4 must have a comment containing 'Unauthorized vendor. Please submit personal reimbursement for line item: 1.'
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-5 must have a comment containing 'Missing business justification. Please submit personal reimbursement for line items: 2, 3.'.

In `slack_data.json`, channel D002 must contain a message with '[T&E Review Flag]' for Employee ID EMP-2103, referencing expense date around March 28 2026, amount $215.00, merchant Capital Grille, noting missing calendar event, and stating action taken in OPS_HR_TE workflow.

In `slack_data.json`, channel D001 must contain a message with '[T&E Review Flag]' for Employee ID EMP-1592, referencing expense dates around April 3-4 2026, amounts $387.00 and $245.00, merchants Delta Airlines and Hilton Garden Inn SFO, noting missing calendar event, and stating action taken in OPS_HR_TE workflow.
In `slack_data.json`, no message in channel D001 or D002 must contain 'EMP-1847' or 'EMP-2287'.

In `mailbox.json`, a sent email must exist addressed to people@vanguardshield.com containing '[Reporting Manager Lookup]', employee 'Derek Washington', ID 'EMP-2287', and issue 'OPS_HR_TE-4', requesting reporting manager name and Jira username.
In `mailbox.json`, no email must contain 'OPS_HR_TE-2', 'OPS_HR_TE-3', or 'OPS_HR_TE-5' in the subject or body.
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-2 must NOT have comments containing 'Missing business justification' or 'unauthorized vendor'.
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-3 must NOT have comments containing 'T&E review complete—all lines supported' or 'Unauthorized vendor'.
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-4 must NOT have comments containing 'T&E review complete—all lines supported' or 'Missing business justification'.
In `jira_state.json`, no ticket must contain 'Manager Lookup'.
In `jira_state.json`, issue OPS_HR_TE-5 must NOT have comments containing 'T&E review complete—all lines supported' or 'Unauthorized vendor'.
In `mailbox.json`, no email contains '[T&E Manager Lookup]' in its subject or body.
In `mailbox.json`, there must be exactly 2 sent emails.
